title: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
summary_full: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.
summary_public: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.
